description: Lock mars_closed_loop_agriculture to controlled-environment crop production for Martian habitats, grounded in habitat infrastructure, orbital plant-growth systems, and closed-loop life support rather than open ecosystem restoration.

checks.reason: The node is scoped to food systems inside long-duration Martian surface habitats.
Orbital plant-growth systems provide the controlled-environment crop-production lineage.
Closed-loop life support supplies the water, nutrient, waste, atmosphere, and crop-loop capability in the node claim.
Open ecosystem repair is broader than habitat closed-loop agriculture and should not be a direct prerequisite for this node.
